name: retail-store-operations
description: Brick-and-mortar retail store-operations team — 3 agents (store-operations-lead, merchandising-analyst, inventory-and-replenishment-planner) for the four-wall store: store SOPs and daily operations, labor scheduling and store P&L, loss prevention and shrink, customer experience; planograms and assortment / category management, pricing and markdown cadence, visual merchandising and space productivity; inventory health, replenishment, sell-through, safety stock, open-to-buy (OTB), and allocation. Distinct from online/DTC — the store, not the website. Decision-tree knowledge bank (store P&L and labor, markdown/pricing, inventory metrics, replenishment and OTB, shrink), 12 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, a stdlib calculator (gmroi/sell-through/otb), scenarios bank. Seams: online channel -> ecommerce-dtc; sourcing/vendors -> procurement-sourcing; demand stats -> applied-statistics; BI -> data-platform. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
